url: local: soroswap-router-sdk@1.4.6 Router.route() + Soroban RPC simulateTransaction (https://mainnet.sorobanrpc.com)

params.voie: A (keyless local SDK routing; live mainnet reserves via read-only RPC simulation)

routerConstructor.getPairsFns: [{ protocol: 'soroswap', fn: live reserves from Soroban RPC }]

assetFormat: SAC contract address (C...), 7 decimals. Soroswap operates on Soroban contract addresses (SAC), not classic asset codes.
amountFormat: raw stroops string '10000000000' (= 1000 BLND, 7 decimals) via CurrencyAmount.fromRawAmount. The human '1000' form is NOT accepted by the SDK amount math.
notes: Keyless. SOROSWAP_API_KEY empty. No private key, no signing, no submission: pure read-only simulateTransaction.

The SDK's own blockchain pair-fetch path is broken on current mainnet: its bundled @stellar/stellar-sdk v11 cannot decode protocol-22+ XDR (SorobanDataBuilder.fromXDR -> 'Bad union switch: 1'). Worked around by feeding live reserves (read via repo @stellar/stellar-sdk v15) into the Router through getPairsFns. All route selection + Soroswap 0.3% pool-fee math (997/1000) run inside the SDK.

Voie B (HTTP) NOT usable keyless: POST https://api.soroswap.finance/quote?network=mainnet returns HTTP 403 Forbidden (requires SOROSWAP_API_KEY). Keyless metadata endpoints that DID work: GET /api/mainnet/factory (200), GET /api/mainnet/router (200).
